options.name: -i
options.description: Prompt before overwriting an existing file

options.name: -n
options.description: Do not overwrite an existing file

options.name: -p
options.description: Preserve modification time, modes, and ownership

options.name: -a
options.description: Archive mode; preserve structure and attributes

options.name: -v
options.description: Show files as they are copied

options.name: -H
options.description: Follow symbolic links given on the command line
